name: Pasta Di Pina
recipeInstructions:
1. Finely chop the garlic cloves.
2. In a medium skillet, heat olive oil over medium heat. Cook the garlic and bread crumbs until golden, stirring constantly. Stir in pepper and set aside.
3. In a large saucepan, mix the onion soup with water. Bring to a boil, then add the noodles. Simmer, uncovered, stirring frequently for 7 minutes or until the noodles are tender (do not drain).
4. Remove from heat and toss with the bread crumb mixture and parsley. Sprinkle with cheese.
5. Serve. Makes about 4 appetizer servings or 2 main-dish servings.
